Row.Text: The [B]Diplomatic Victory[/B] is awarded to a leader when they achieve political dominance against all other leaders. This dominance is measured by [B]Presige[/B] and comes from the following sources:[NN][BLIST] [LI][B]Endeavours and Sanctions[/B]: +1 Prestige per Endeavour or Sanction. [LI][B]Suzeraining City States[/B]: +10 Prestige per Suzerained City State. [LI][B]Espionage[/B]: +2 Prestige per successful Espionage. [LI][B]Celebrations[/B]: +1 Prestige per Celebration. [LI][B]War Support[/B]: +3 Prestige per War Support, including proxy wars.[/LIST][NN]Certain Triumphs in the Modern Age also provide Prestige.

The [B]Expansionist Victory[/B] is awarded to a leader when they achieve demographic dominance against all other leaders. This dominance is measured by [B]Population[/B] and comes from the following sources:[NN][BLIST] [LI][B]Rural Population[/B]: +1 Population. [LI][B]Urban Population[/B]: +2 Population. [LI][B]Specialists[/B]: +3 Population. [/LIST][NN]Certain Triumphs in the Modern Age also provide Population.
